text: We have several other long-term power purchase agreements including contracts for 135 MWs nameplate capacity from wind generation, 310 MWs from unspecified resources, 52 MWs of natural gas generation, and 13 MWs of hydro supply.
We also purchase the output of four wind projects, three of which are QFs, under power purchase agreements.
In the past, we have relied upon both in-state and out-of-state power purchase agreements for grid reliability and to physically serve customers.
Revenues are also impacted by customer growth and usage, the latter of which is primarily affected by weather and the impact of energy efficiency initiatives and investment.
